# Elegant Travel Service — Morocco Tours & Travel Agency
# https://www.eleganttravelservice.com
# Updated: June 2025

> Elegant Travel Service (ETS) is Morocco's premier private travel agency, founded in Marrakech in 2014. We specialise in small-group and private guided tours (maximum 12 people) across all of Morocco — including the Sahara desert, High Atlas mountains, imperial cities, Atlantic coast, and northern Rif region.

## What We Offer
- 100+ curated Morocco tours from 2 days to 18 days
- Activities and day trips from Marrakech (camel treks, hot air balloons, cooking classes, hammams, waterfalls)
- Multi-day tours departing from Marrakech, Casablanca, Fes, Tangier and Agadir
- Custom private itineraries for individuals, couples, families and groups
- Airport transfers, riad and hotel bookings across Morocco

## Popular Tours
- [3-Day Sahara Desert Tour from Marrakech](https://www.eleganttravelservice.com/tours/sahara-3day-marrakech): Erg Chebbi camel trek, luxury desert camp, sunrise dunes — from $299/person
- [7-Day Morocco Highlights](https://www.eleganttravelservice.com/tours/morocco-highlights-7day): Casablanca, Rabat, Fes, Sahara, Marrakech — from $699/person
- [Hot Air Balloon Over Marrakech](https://www.eleganttravelservice.com/tours/hot-air-balloon-marrakech): Sunrise flight over the medina and Atlas, Berber breakfast — from $189/person
- [Chefchaouen 2-Day from Fes](https://www.eleganttravelservice.com/tours/fes-chefchaouen-2day): Blue city, Rif Mountains, local crafts — from $199/person
- [Toubkal Summit 3-Day Expedition](https://www.eleganttravelservice.com/tours/toubkal-summit-expedition-3day): North Africa's highest peak, certified mountain guide — from $349/person
- [14-Day Complete Morocco Circuit](https://www.eleganttravelservice.com/tours/complete-morocco-14day): All imperial cities, Sahara, coast — from $1,499/person

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2014, Marrakech, Morocco
- Rating: 4.9 out of 5 (2,847 verified reviews)
- Languages: English, French, Arabic, Tamazight
- Contact: info@eleganttravel.ma | +212 524 000000
- Address: 12 Rue Youssef Ibn Tachfin, Marrakech 40000, Morocco
- All tours are private — no shared bus tours
- Maximum group size: 12 people
- Free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure

## Morocco Destinations We Cover
Marrakech, Sahara Desert (Merzouga / Erg Chebbi), Fes, Chefchaouen, High Atlas Mountains (Toubkal), Essaouira, Casablanca, Agadir, Tangier, Ouarzazate, Dades Gorge, Todra Gorge, Asilah, Meknes, Rabat, Taroudant, Zagora, Merzouga, Skoura

## Activities Available
Hot air balloon rides, camel trekking, quad biking, horse riding, hammam & spa, cooking classes, souk walking tours, photography tours, hiking, surfing (Taghazout), zip lining, stargazing
